mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB" C
C."CLUB_CATEGORY" = #{clubCategory}
AND
C."CLUB_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
C."CLUB_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( C."CLUB_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR C."CLUB_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR C."CLUB_CONTENTS" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )

SELECT C.*, M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "OWNER_NAME", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" CM2 WHERE CM2."CLUB_NUM" = C."CLUB_NUM" AND CM2."ROLE_NUM" IN (1, 2) ) AS "CURRENT_MEMBER"
FROM "TB_CLUB" C
LEFT JOIN "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" CM ON C."CLUB_NUM" = CM."CLUB_NUM" AND CM."ROLE_NUM" = 1
LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CM."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ("CLUB_NUM") "FILE_NUM", "FILE_NAME", "ORI_NAME", "CLUB_NUM" FROM "TB_CLUBFILE" ORDER BY "CLUB_NUM", "FILE_NUM" ASC ) F ON C."CLUB_NUM" = F."CLUB_NUM"
C."CLUB_CATEGORY" = #{clubCategory}
AND
C."CLUB_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
C."CLUB_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%'
( C."CLUB_NAME" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR C."CLUB_LOCATION" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR C."CLUB_CONTENTS" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
ORDER BY C."CLUB_NUM" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT C.*, COUNT(CASE WHEN CM."ROLE_NUM" IN (1, 2) THEN 1 END) AS "CURRENT_MEMBER", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME", OWNER."MEMBER_NAME" AS "OWNER_NAME"
FROM "TB_CLUB" C
LEFT JOIN "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" CM ON C."CLUB_NUM" = CM."CLUB_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_CLUBFILE" F ON C."CLUB_NUM" = F."CLUB_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" OCM ON C."CLUB_NUM" = OCM."CLUB_NUM" AND OCM."ROLE_NUM" = 1
LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" OWNER ON OCM."MEMBER_NUM" = OWNER."MEMBER_NUM"
WHERE C."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}
GROUP BY C."CLUB_NUM", F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME", OWNER."MEMBER_NAME"

SELECT C.*,
F."FILE_NUM", F."FILE_NAME", F."ORI_NAME",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" CM2 WHERE CM2."CLUB_NUM" = C."CLUB_NUM" AND CM2."ROLE_NUM" IN (1,2) ) AS "CURRENT_MEMBER"
FROM "TB_CLUB" C
INNER JOIN "TB_CLUB_MEMBER" CM ON C."CLUB_NUM" = CM."CLUB_NUM"
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON ("CLUB_NUM") "FILE_NUM", "FILE_NAME", "ORI_NAME", "CLUB_NUM" FROM "TB_CLUBFILE" ORDER BY "CLUB_NUM", "FILE_NUM" ASC ) F ON C."CLUB_NUM" = F."CLUB_NUM"
WHERE CM."MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum} AND CM."ROLE_NUM" IN (1,2)
ORDER BY C."CLUB_NUM" DESC
